name: X-Golf Cedar Park
address: 12301 W Parmer Ln Building 1, Unit 105, Cedar Park, TX 78613
about: X-Golf Cedar Park is a modern indoor golf facility featuring seven high-accuracy simulators in a 6,000 sq ft space. It offers a full bar with cocktails, beer, and wine, along with pizza and appetizers for a complete entertainment experience. The venue caters to golfers of all levels with PGA lessons, memberships, leagues, tournaments, and PXG club fittings. Each simulator accommodates up to 6 people and provides a premium experience with automatic ball teeing and fresh turf. The facility also features 12 TVs for sporting events and is available for private events and team building activities.
why_golfers_like_it: World's most accurate golf simulator technology analyzing 6,000 measurements per second
Premium experience with automatic ball teeing and fresh turf
Comprehensive amenities including full bar, food, and 12 TVs for sports events

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar with cocktails, beer, and wine

simulator_hardware.notes: Combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed as the venue offers its own full bar and food menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Generally, it takes 1 hour for an individual player to complete 18 holes. If playing with multiple people, you may need to book additional time depending on the group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Cedar Park welcomes children of all ages.
